## Severity (money / trust)

- [ ] **Sev 0** — dupe exploit, currency mint exploit, RLS bypass, RNG attack, signature forgery on `unique_token`. Drop everything; do not post details publicly. Email security disclosure path (see `SECURITY.md`).
- [ ] **Sev 1** — wrong item granted, wrong balance, trade lost — fixable but affects player trust.
- [ ] **Sev 2** — visual / UX bug, no money impact.
- [ ] **Sev 3** — nit, polish.
